description: Top-5 projects by LiteLLM-computed dollar spend and token volume over the selected time range. Source of truth is LiteLLM's own metadata-only spend ledger (read-only grafana_ro PostgreSQL datasource); every query is bounded top-N SQL, never a high-cardinality metric label.

panels.description: LiteLLM-computed spend per project (LiteLLM_SpendLogs joined to the issuing key's aigw_project_id metadata). Keys without portal project metadata report as 'unattributed'.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  COALESCE(NULLIF(vt.metadata ->> 'aigw_project_id', ''), 'unattributed') AS "project",
  SUM(sl.spend) AS "spend_usd"
FROM "LiteLLM_SpendLogs" sl
LEFT JOIN "LiteLLM_VerificationToken" vt ON vt.token = sl.api_key
WHERE $__timeFilter(sl."startTime")
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 2 DESC
LIMIT 5

panels.title: Top 5 Projects by Spend

panels.description: Total tokens (prompt + completion) per project over the selected range.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  COALESCE(NULLIF(vt.metadata ->> 'aigw_project_id', ''), 'unattributed') AS "project",
  SUM(sl.total_tokens) AS "total_tokens"
FROM "LiteLLM_SpendLogs" sl
LEFT JOIN "LiteLLM_VerificationToken" vt ON vt.token = sl.api_key
WHERE $__timeFilter(sl."startTime")
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 2 DESC
LIMIT 5

panels.title: Top 5 Projects by Token Volume

panels.description: Spend over time for the five projects with the highest spend in the selected range (bounded CTE — the series set can never exceed six).

targets.rawSql:
WITH top_projects AS (
  SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(vt.metadata ->> 'aigw_project_id', ''), 'unattributed') AS project
  FROM "LiteLLM_SpendLogs" sl
  LEFT JOIN "LiteLLM_VerificationToken" vt ON vt.token = sl.api_key
  WHERE $__timeFilter(sl."startTime")
  GROUP BY 1
  ORDER BY SUM(sl.spend) DESC
  LIMIT 5
)
SELECT
  $__timeGroupAlias(sl."startTime", $__interval),
  COALESCE(NULLIF(vt.metadata ->> 'aigw_project_id', ''), 'unattributed') AS "metric",
  SUM(sl.spend) AS "spend_usd"
FROM "LiteLLM_SpendLogs" sl
LEFT JOIN "LiteLLM_VerificationToken" vt ON vt.token = sl.api_key
WHERE $__timeFilter(sl."startTime")
  AND COALESCE(NULLIF(vt.metadata ->> 'aigw_project_id', ''), 'unattributed')
      IN (SELECT project FROM top_projects)
GROUP BY 1, 2
ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Top-5 Project Spend Over Time

panels.description: Request, token, and spend detail for the top five projects by spend.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  COALESCE(NULLIF(vt.metadata ->> 'aigw_project_id', ''), 'unattributed') AS "project",
  COUNT(*) AS "requests",
  SUM(sl.prompt_tokens) AS "prompt_tokens",
  SUM(sl.completion_tokens) AS "completion_tokens",
  SUM(sl.total_tokens) AS "total_tokens",
  SUM(sl.spend) AS "spend_usd"
FROM "LiteLLM_SpendLogs" sl
LEFT JOIN "LiteLLM_VerificationToken" vt ON vt.token = sl.api_key
WHERE $__timeFilter(sl."startTime")
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 6 DESC
LIMIT 5
